LanguageData.corsaircreed.label: <color=#B7410E>corsair creed</color>
LanguageData.corsaircreed.description:
Life under the black signal has burned a ruthless doctrine into bone and nerve. The host strikes fast, fights dirty, and turns every wreck and battlefield into profit for the crew.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsaircreed_boarder.label: boarding momentum
LanguageData.corsaircreed_boarder.description:
Close-quarters boarding drills amplify speed, control, and brutal follow-through.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsaircreed_gunner.label: deck gunner's eye
LanguageData.corsaircreed_gunner.description:
Predatory timing and recoil control sharpen ranged lethality.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsaircreed_scavenger.label: wreck scavenger instinct
LanguageData.corsaircreed_scavenger.description:
Loot-minded reflexes improve hauling, stripping, and rapid battlefield recovery.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsaircreed_blackflag.label: blackflag audacity
LanguageData.corsaircreed_blackflag.description:
A raider's nerve dulls fear and pain, keeping the host aggressive when others would fold.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsaircreed_gunner_posture.label: deck gunnery posture
LanguageData.corsaircreed_gunner_posture.description:
The host enters a stabilized gunnery stance during live exchanges, sacrificing subtlety for relentless ranged pressure.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsaircreed_marauder_frenzy.label: marauder frenzy
LanguageData.corsaircreed_marauder_frenzy.description:
At critical health in close battle, the corsair doctrine abandons restraint and forces a lethal surge.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsair_broadside_overdrive.label: broadside overdrive
LanguageData.corsair_broadside_overdrive.description:
An all-in firing rhythm tuned for short violent exchanges. Accuracy cadence rises, but exposure risk increases.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsair_cutthroat_rush.label: cutthroat rush
LanguageData.corsair_cutthroat_rush.description:
The host commits to a savage boarding sprint. Pursuit and close-range lethality spike at the cost of tactical exposure.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.corsair_plunder_marked.label: marked for plunder
LanguageData.corsair_plunder_marked.description:
The target is highlighted as easy loot, disrupting footing and composure under fire.
created/edited by easyrim
